title: semantic-release block metadata
description: Artifact emitted by the semantic-release building block after go-semantic-release determines and creates (or skips) a new version.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the block completed.

new_release_published.description: Whether a new release was created. false means no releasable commits were found.

version.description: The new semantic version string (e.g. v1.2.3). Present only when new_release_published is true.

major_version.description: Major version component. Present only when new_release_published is true.

minor_version.description: Minor version component. Present only when new_release_published is true.

patch_version.description: Patch version component. Present only when new_release_published is true.

git_tag.description: Git tag created (e.g. v1.2.3). Present only when new_release_published is true.

git_head.description: Git commit SHA of the release. Present only when new_release_published is true.

release_url.description: URL of the created GitHub release. Present only when new_release_published is true.
